news.headline: US envoys met with mediators in Qatar, talks with Iran up in the air
news.summary: US envoys met Qatari mediators in Doha on Tuesday for discussions on negotiations with Iran, even as both Tehran and Doha dismissed President Donald Trump's suggestion that direct US – Iran talks were taking place. news.headline: France sets presidential election date as Macron finishes final term
news.summary: France will hold the first round of its next presidential election on April 18, 2027, with a run-off set for May 2, an executive source said on Tuesday. news.headline: South Africa's anti-migrant protesters march nationwide, after thousands flee violence

news.headline: JIATF 401 Leaders Visit Whiteman Air Force Base to Strengthen Counter-Drone Operations
news.summary: Joint Interagency Task Force 401 leaders visited Whiteman Air Force Base, Mo., to learn about the installation's counter-unmanned aerial systems operations and initiatives in advance of the upcoming directed energy pilot program.

news.headline: Sinking Exercise Demonstrates Capabilities of Joint Force
news.summary: U.S. Pacific Command joint forces, along with allied and partner forces, successfully carried out a live-fire sinking exercise during Valiant Shield 2026, targeting the decommissioned amphibious transport dock USS Juneau off the coast of Guam.
